assertions.assertion: A class extending DefaultRefreshTokenService is defined
The AcceptConsumedTokenAsync method is overridden to allow consumed tokens within a 30-second grace window using ConsumedTime
assertions.rationale: Overrides AcceptConsumedTokenAsync, checks ConsumedTime within 30-second window.

assertions.assertion: The service is registered as IRefreshTokenService in the DI container
The mobile_app client has RefreshTokenUsage set to TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly
DeleteOneTimeOnlyRefreshTokensOnUse is set to false in the persistent grant options or operational store options
